title: Fix gateway forwarding to prefer RPL local mesh before TUN/Yggdrasil
description: Per spec/05-routing.md:7.2 and appendix-border-router, BR must classify incoming mesh IPv6 packets: if dst in RPL routes (local mesh), forward downward via RPL source routing or Node router; else inject to TUN (Yggdrasil/kernel). Current forward_mesh_to_upstream unconditionally sends all to TUN (see lichend.rs:350, gateway.rs:34). Update Gateway to integrate Router/RplNode or use routes map for classification. Add mesh_to_mesh forward path that re-compresses and queues to SLIP/sim TX. Update run_sim/run_serial to handle both paths. Update tests. 3 codereview passes required before closing ydtk.
notes: Implemented mesh_to_mesh for link-local/ULA; updated upstream_to_mesh to prefer local RPL routes with source routing; fixed test for unknown routes. Commit: c9406dea5
close_reason: Gateway forwarding fixed to prefer RPL local mesh (is_local_mesh + mesh_to_mesh path) before TUN/Yggdrasil per spec/05-routing.md:7.2 and appendix. Integrated RplNode in Gateway, updated forward_mesh_to_upstream in lichend.rs:457, added mesh_to_mesh. Tests pass, codereview passes done via children. Commit 37cf7c5dc
